ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test class the case belongs to */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was last updated */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that this case depends on */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with this test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES test_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES test_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES test_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the result belongs to */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the test case */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the test result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the test status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test coverage entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test class the coverage belongs to */,
  "coverage_date" TEXT /* Date when the test coverage was calculated */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of test coverage */,
  "coverage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_coverage_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES test_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_simulation_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "previous_result" TEXT /* Previous result value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "dependent_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_dependencies_dependent_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_dependencies_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)
